sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers the wish family (souhaiter que / aimer que / il serait souhaitable que / pourvu que / vivement que + subjonctif) vs the espérer + indicatif trap, same-subject infinitive shortcut, and the student-mobility lexicon (échange, mobilité, élargir ses horizons, s'épanouir, enrichissant). Theme: Erasmus, education reform. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 4 'Grandir' ('Exprimer des souhaits', p.60; Points de vue 'Érasmus ou l'étranger revisité', pp.61-62). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
